## 91. 全网热搜聚合 `hot-search`

> 聚合微博热搜、知乎热榜、B站日榜、百度贴吧热议，一次请求获取全网热门话题。支持按平台筛选和条数限制。

- 接口地址: `https://v1.apizero.cn/api/hot-search`
- 请求方法: `POST`
- 分类: content
- 计费: 免费试用 · 单次 0 积分
- QPS: 3 / s
- 每日免费额度: 3000 次（登录用户）· 2000 次（匿名）
- 文档链接: https://apizero.cn/aidocs/hot-search · 完整 Markdown: https://apizero.cn/aidocs/hot-search/raw.md

认证: 需要 API Key。登录用户每日 30 次免费；匿名每日 20 次。

### 请求参数

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 | 示例 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `platform` | `string` | 否 | 平台筛选：all/weibo/zhihu/bilibili/tieba，逗号分隔 | `all` |
| `limit` | `int` | 否 | 每个平台返回条数，最大50 | `10` |
| `timeout` | `int` | 否 | 请求超时秒数 | `15` |

### 请求头

| Header | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 | 示例 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `string` | 是 | — | — |

### 调用示例

cURL:

```bash
curl -X POST "https://v1.apizero.cn/api/hot-search" \
  -H "X-Api-Key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
  "platform": "all",
  "limit": "10",
  "timeout": "15"
}'

```

Python:

```python
import requests

resp = requests.request(
    "POST",
    "https://v1.apizero.cn/api/hot-search",
    headers={"X-Api-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY", "Content-Type": "application/json"},
    json={
    "platform": "all",
    "limit": "10",
    "timeout": "15",
},
    timeout=15,
)
resp.raise_for_status()
print(resp.json())

```

JavaScript (Node.js):

```javascript
// Node.js 18+ / 浏览器原生 fetch
const res = await fetch("https://v1.apizero.cn/api/hot-search", {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "X-Api-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    "platform": "all",
    "limit": "10",
    "timeout": "15"
  }),
});
if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
const data = await res.json();
console.log(data);

```

Go:

```go
package main

import (
	"bytes"
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func main() {
	body := []byte(`{"platform":"all","limit":"10","timeout":"15"}`)
	req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST", "https://v1.apizero.cn/api/hot-search", bytes.NewBuffer(body))
	req.Header.Set("X-Api-Key", "YOUR_API_KEY")
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")

	resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
	if err != nil { panic(err) }
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	out, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
	fmt.Println(string(out))
}

```

PHP:

```php
<?php
$payload = json_encode([
    "platform" => "all",
    "limit" => "10",
    "timeout" => "15",
], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);

$ch = curl_init("https://v1.apizero.cn/api/hot-search");
curl_setopt_array($ch, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST  => "POST",
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS     => $payload,
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        "X-Api-Key: YOUR_API_KEY",
        "Content-Type: application/json",
    ],
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 15,
]);
$body = curl_exec($ch);
curl_close($ch);

$data = json_decode($body, true);
print_r($data);

```

### 响应字段

| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 | 示例 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `generated_at` | `string` | 数据生成时间（ISO8601） | — |
| `requested_platforms` | `array` | 本次请求的平台列表 | — |
| `limit_per_platform` | `int` | 每个平台返回条数 | — |
| `total_items` | `int` | 总条数 | — |
| `failed_platforms` | `object` | 失败平台及原因 | — |
| `platforms` | `object` | 各平台数据（name/homepage/status/count/items） | — |

### 响应示例

```json
{
    "code": 0,
    "msg": "成功",
    "data": {
        "generated_at": "2026-05-08T13:00:00+08:00",
        "requested_platforms": [
            "weibo",
            "zhihu",
            "bilibili",
            "tieba"
        ],
        "limit_per_platform": 10,
        "total_items": 40,
        "failed_platforms": {},
        "platforms": {
            "weibo": {
                "name": "微博热搜",
                "status": "success",
                "count": 10,
                "items": [
                    {
                        "rank": 1,
                        "title": "热搜标题",
                        "hot": "5234567"
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    },
    "request_id": "req_abc123"
}

```

### 错误码

| code | status | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `4000` | `—` | 无效的 platform 值 |
| `5020` | `—` | 所有平台抓取失败 |

### 最近变更

- 1.0.0 (2026-05-08)
- 首次上线
- 支持微博/知乎/B站/贴吧四平台

---

## 92. B站弹幕分析 `bili-danmaku`

> 输入B站BV/AV号，拉取视频弹幕并分析高频重复弹幕、热词/梗、整体情感倾向（正向/负向/中性）。

- 接口地址: `https://v1.apizero.cn/api/bili-danmaku`
- 请求方法: `POST`
- 分类: content
- 计费: 免费试用 · 单次 0 积分
- QPS: 2 / s
- 每日免费额度: 20 次（登录用户）· 10 次（匿名）
- 文档链接: https://apizero.cn/aidocs/bili-danmaku · 完整 Markdown: https://apizero.cn/aidocs/bili-danmaku/raw.md

认证: 需要 API Key。登录用户每日 20 次免费；匿名每日 10 次。

### 请求参数

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 | 示例 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `video` | `string` | 是 | AV号或BV号 | `BV1w8RBBUEYy` |
| `limit` | `int` | 否 | 返回高频弹幕/热词数量 | `10` |
| `timeout` | `int` | 否 | 超时秒数 | `15` |
| `page_mode` | `string` | 否 | all=抓全部分P / first=只抓第一页 | `all` |

### 请求头

| Header | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 | 示例 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `string` | 是 | — | — |

### 调用示例

cURL:

```bash
curl -X POST "https://v1.apizero.cn/api/bili-danmaku" \
  -H "X-Api-Key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
  "video": "BV1w8RBBUEYy",
  "limit": "10",
  "timeout": "15",
  "page_mode": "all"
}'

```

Python:

```python
import requests

resp = requests.request(
    "POST",
    "https://v1.apizero.cn/api/bili-danmaku",
    headers={"X-Api-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY", "Content-Type": "application/json"},
    json={
    "video": "BV1w8RBBUEYy",
    "limit": "10",
    "timeout": "15",
    "page_mode": "all",
},
    timeout=15,
)
resp.raise_for_status()
print(resp.json())

```

JavaScript (Node.js):

```javascript
// Node.js 18+ / 浏览器原生 fetch
const res = await fetch("https://v1.apizero.cn/api/bili-danmaku", {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "X-Api-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    "video": "BV1w8RBBUEYy",
    "limit": "10",
    "timeout": "15",
    "page_mode": "all"
  }),
});
if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
const data = await res.json();
console.log(data);

```

Go:

```go
package main

import (
	"bytes"
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func main() {
	body := []byte(`{"video":"BV1w8RBBUEYy","limit":"10","timeout":"15","page_mode":"all"}`)
	req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST", "https://v1.apizero.cn/api/bili-danmaku", bytes.NewBuffer(body))
	req.Header.Set("X-Api-Key", "YOUR_API_KEY")
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")

	resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
	if err != nil { panic(err) }
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	out, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
	fmt.Println(string(out))
}

```

PHP:

```php
<?php
$payload = json_encode([
    "video" => "BV1w8RBBUEYy",
    "limit" => "10",
    "timeout" => "15",
    "page_mode" => "all",
], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);

$ch = curl_init("https://v1.apizero.cn/api/bili-danmaku");
curl_setopt_array($ch, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST  => "POST",
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS     => $payload,
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        "X-Api-Key: YOUR_API_KEY",
        "Content-Type: application/json",
    ],
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 15,
]);
$body = curl_exec($ch);
curl_close($ch);

$data = json_decode($body, true);
print_r($data);

```

### 响应字段

| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 | 示例 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `video` | `object` | 视频基本信息（bvid/title/duration） | — |
| `page_stats` | `array` | 每个分P的弹幕数量 | — |
| `danmaku_summary.total_count` | `int` | 弹幕总量 | — |
| `danmaku_summary.top_meme` | `string` | 当前刷得最多的梗 | — |
| `danmaku_summary.top_repeat_comments` | `array` | 高频重复弹幕（text+count） | — |
| `danmaku_summary.top_terms` | `array` | 高频热词（term+count） | — |
| `sentiment_summary.label` | `string` | 整体情感倾向（positive/negative/neutral） | — |
| `sentiment_summary.average_score` | `float` | 平均情感分数 | — |

### 响应示例

```json
{
    "code": 0,
    "msg": "成功",
    "data": {
        "video": {
            "bvid": "BV1w8RBBUEYy",
            "title": "视频标题",
            "duration": 300
        },
        "danmaku_summary": {
            "total_count": 1500,
            "top_meme": "哈哈哈哈",
            "top_repeat_comments": [
                {
                    "text": "哈哈哈哈",
                    "count": 120
                }
            ],
            "top_terms": [
                {
                    "term": "牛逼",
                    "count": 200
                }
            ]
        },
        "sentiment_summary": {
            "label": "positive",
            "average_score": 0.72
        }
    },
    "request_id": "req_abc123"
}

```

### 错误码

| code | status | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `4000` | `—` | 缺少 video 参数或无效的 AV/BV 号 |
| `5020` | `—` | B站弹幕接口请求失败 |

### 最近变更

- 1.0.0 (2026-05-08)
- 首次上线
- 支持高频弹幕/热词/情感分析

---

## 93. DNS 查询 `dns-lookup`

> 零依赖DNS查询API。自实现DNS协议（RFC 1035），支持A/AAAA/MX/TXT/CNAME/NS/SOA/SRV/PTR/CAA记录类型，UDP自动fallback到DoH（DNS over HTTPS）防劫持。

- 接口地址: `https://v1.apizero.cn/api/dns-lookup`
- 请求方法: `POST`
- 分类: dev
- 计费: 免费试用 · 单次 0 积分
- QPS: 5 / s
- 每日免费额度: 500 次（登录用户）· 300 次（匿名）
- 文档链接: https://apizero.cn/aidocs/dns-lookup · 完整 Markdown: https://apizero.cn/aidocs/dns-lookup/raw.md

认证: 需要 API Key。登录用户每日 50 次免费；匿名每日 30 次。

### 请求参数

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 | 示例 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `domain` | `string` | 是 | 要查询的域名（别名 name/host） | `example.com` |
| `type` | `string` | 否 | 记录类型，逗号分隔；ALL=A,AAAA,MX,TXT,CNAME | `A` |
| `server` | `string` | 否 | 指定DNS服务器（逗号分隔） | `8.8.8.8,1.1.1.1` |
| `timeout` | `int` | 否 | 单请求超时秒（1~30） | `5` |
| `doh` | `int` | 否 | 1=强制走DoH（HTTPS） | `0` |
| `doh_provider` | `string` | 否 | DoH服务商：cloudflare/google/alibaba | `cloudflare` |

### 请求头

| Header | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 | 示例 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `string` | 是 | — | — |

### 调用示例

cURL:

```bash
curl -X POST "https://v1.apizero.cn/api/dns-lookup" \
  -H "X-Api-Key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
  "domain": "example.com",
  "type": "A",
  "server": "8.8.8.8,1.1.1.1",
  "timeout": "5",
  "doh": "0",
  "doh_provider": "cloudflare"
}'

```

Python:

```python
import requests

resp = requests.request(
    "POST",
    "https://v1.apizero.cn/api/dns-lookup",
    headers={"X-Api-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY", "Content-Type": "application/json"},
    json={
    "domain": "example.com",
    "type": "A",
    "server": "8.8.8.8,1.1.1.1",
    "timeout": "5",
    "doh": "0",
    "doh_provider": "cloudflare",
},
    timeout=15,
)
resp.raise_for_status()
print(resp.json())

```

JavaScript (Node.js):

```javascript
// Node.js 18+ / 浏览器原生 fetch
const res = await fetch("https://v1.apizero.cn/api/dns-lookup", {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "X-Api-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    "domain": "example.com",
    "type": "A",
    "server": "8.8.8.8,1.1.1.1",
    "timeout": "5",
    "doh": "0",
    "doh_provider": "cloudflare"
  }),
});
if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
const data = await res.json();
console.log(data);

```

Go:

```go
package main

import (
	"bytes"
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func main() {
	body := []byte(`{"domain":"example.com","type":"A","server":"8.8.8.8,1.1.1.1","timeout":"5","doh":"0","doh_provider":"cloudflare"}`)
	req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST", "https://v1.apizero.cn/api/dns-lookup", bytes.NewBuffer(body))
	req.Header.Set("X-Api-Key", "YOUR_API_KEY")
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")

	resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
	if err != nil { panic(err) }
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	out, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
	fmt.Println(string(out))
}

```

PHP:

```php
<?php
$payload = json_encode([
    "domain" => "example.com",
    "type" => "A",
    "server" => "8.8.8.8,1.1.1.1",
    "timeout" => "5",
    "doh" => "0",
    "doh_provider" => "cloudflare",
], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);

$ch = curl_init("https://v1.apizero.cn/api/dns-lookup");
curl_setopt_array($ch, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST  => "POST",
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS     => $payload,
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        "X-Api-Key: YOUR_API_KEY",
        "Content-Type: application/json",
    ],
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 15,
]);
$body = curl_exec($ch);
curl_close($ch);

$data = json_decode($body, true);
print_r($data);

```

### 响应字段

| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 | 示例 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `domain` | `string` | 查询的域名 | — |
| `type` | `string` | 查询的记录类型 | — |
| `server` | `string` | 响应的DNS服务器 | — |
| `transport` | `string` | 传输方式（udp/tcp/doh） | — |
| `rcode` | `int` | DNS响应码 | — |
| `rcode_text` | `string` | 响应码文本（NOERROR/NXDOMAIN等） | — |
| `elapsed_ms` | `int` | 查询耗时（毫秒） | — |
| `answers` | `array` | 应答记录数组（type/name/ttl/value） | — |
| `truncated` | `bool` | 是否被截断 | — |

### 响应示例

```json
{
    "code": 0,
    "msg": "成功",
    "data": {
        "domain": "example.com",
        "type": "A",
        "server": "114.114.114.114",
        "transport": "udp",
        "rcode": 0,
        "rcode_text": "NOERROR",
        "elapsed_ms": 32,
        "answers": [
            {
                "type": "A",
                "name": "example.com",
                "ttl": 300,
                "value": "93.184.216.34"
            }
        ],
        "truncated": false
    },
    "request_id": "req_abc123"
}

```

### 错误码

| code | status | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `4000` | `—` | 缺少 domain / 非法字符 / 未知 type |
| `5020` | `—` | 全部DNS服务器与DoH都失败 |
| `5021` | `—` | 域名不存在（NXDOMAIN） |

### 最近变更

- 1.0.0 (2026-05-08)
- 首次上线
- 支持A/AAAA/MX/TXT/CNAME/NS/SOA/SRV/PTR/CAA
- UDP+DoH双链路
